title: RARS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Agromet Observer Posts
description: The Regional Agricultural Research Station (RARS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Agromet Observer Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th can apply for the RARS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application ...
